prs.title: Get CUDA memory pool stats after running into OOM.
[pyspark] Add support for Spark Connect ML
[mt] Define the base score as an array.
Fix macOS wheel OpenMP dependency resolution
Prune GPU sketch after each merge
[DOC] Add Kaggle Playground S5E4 winning XGBoost solution
[python-package] Add specific error codes to all type: ignore comments
[python-package] Fix python -OO crash by guarding __doc__ assignments
Replace GPU quantile double buffering with explicit scratch storage
Inline categorical compaction after GPU sketch merge
[backport] Ignore future return in the destructor. (#12092)
Make GPU sketch prune emit a correct summary
[doc] Update competition winning solutions list with recent entries
Ignore future return in the destructor.
Simplify GPU quantile merge path scan
Fix alignment for in-memory allreduce buffer
docs: add distributed XGBoost on Kubernetes tutorial
[mt] Implement one-hot categorical feature for CPU hist.
Push inplace tree weights into predictors
Push batch tree weights into predictors
[JVM-Packages] Support Regressor and Ranker in Pipeline with columnar input
Do tree reductions instead of allgather in distributed quantile construction
Add tutorial document for federated xgboost
[jvm-packages] Set GPU device id explicitly at very beginning for training
Reduce memory in GPU quantile sketch for external memory
Move internal shap algorithms into separate namespace.
Use the pytest tmp path fixture
Enable categorical feature support by default.
Fix compilation with the latest CCCL.
fix: correct typo 'Recieved' to 'Received' in tracker.cc log message
[ci] Use sccache for Windows CPU build.
Fix compilation with the latest nvcomp.
[EM] Support mixed GPU models on SNMG.
SYCL. Adopt changes from oneapi 2026 release
Cleanup the use of omp clauses
[doc] Update NUMA configuration for external memory.
Enable threaded data initialization for CPU.
[R] Add AFT scale parameter to R docs
[mt] Add a getter for matrix info.
Update pre-commit clang format to latest.
Require at least CTK 12.8 in the CMake config.
[CI] Move remaining style checks to pre-commit
make temporary buffers an instance variable
[doc] Update for the CUDA async pool and the R CRAN package.
Avoid memory usage estimation when the async pool is enabled.
[CI] Move some CI linting jobs to pre-commit
Fix formatting with the latest black.
[ci] Use GHA container for CUDA Linux builds.
Add helper script to run rchk.
Avoid the API guard for the tracker API.
[ci] Use sccache for windows arm Python build.
Make tree stat optional when creating tree views.
[mt] Implement reduced gradient for the CPU hist.
Implement vector load for GPU compressed buffer.
Update dmlc core, disable CUDA async pool on Windows.
Ignore mvn version backup files [skip ci]
[backport][R] Remove wiki links from the document. (#11906)
[R] Remove wiki links from the document.
[ci] Increase timeout for the SHAP test.
[R] Remove unneeded line break in docs
[mt] Assign a thread for each target when building the histogram.
Fix intercept initialization for multinomial logistic objective
[EM] Drop support of GPU external memory page concatenation.
Small cleanup for the C API.
Experimental support for using the CUDA device memory pool.
[R-package] Fix off-by-one bug: nrounds=0 resulted in 2 iterations
[backport] Add nccl as dep for aarch64. (#11753)
[enc] Expose the categories container to C.
Add nccl as dep for aarch64.
[CI] Set up a nightly pipeline to test XGBoost with latest CCCL/RMM
[backport] [CI] Adding ARM CUDA wheels for pypi (#11827)
Fix compilation with the latest cccl (thrust 3.3).
[mt] Support building histogram with shared memory.
[CI] Adding ARM CUDA wheels for pypi
[CI] Add ARM CUDA worker on RunsOn
[R] Remove calls to R's global RNG
Small optimization for the transform kernel.
[CI] Upgrade CI image to use Rapids 25.10
[CI] Disable spot instances for all workers
[mt] Split up the tree model weights, support extmem.
[R] More informative error when passing factors to DMatrix
[mt] Split up gradient types for the GPU hist.
Fix ranking tests with weight norm.
Add Python type hint for tests and demos.
[doc] Document the categories container, remove JSON schema.
[mt] Implement vector leaf for a decision stump on GPU.
Small cleanup for GPU split evaluation.
Small cleanup for the dart booster.
[doc] Cleanup C doc notations and enhance categorical docs.
[doc] Fix code blocks in the R migration guide.
Share the model view for CPU and GPU.
[jvm-packages] use inferBatchSizeParameter instead of hardcoded value in XGBoostEstimator
optimize CPU inference with Array-Based Tree Traversal
Provide device storage for scalar tree.
SYCL. Fixes for the upcoming v3.1
[mt] Implement model dump for all formats.
Small refactor for the GPU predictor.
Implement a tree view for the scalar tree.
[backport][R] Correct docs about attributes of cv object (#11732)
[R] Correct docs about attributes of cv object
[mt] Initial work on vector leaf for the GPU predictor.
[mt] Use tree view for the CPU predictor.
[CI] Use macos-15-intel instead of unsupported macos-13
[CI] Update release script to support xgboost-cu13
Define a MR adapter for the thrust allocator.
Extract the stream, event, and stream view.
[backport] [CI] Patch to fix wheel build for WinARM64 (#11702)
SYCL. Fixes for the current version.
Update references from XGBoost Operator to Kubeflow Trainer
[CI] Patch to fix wheel build for WinARM64
[Bug Fix - Wheel Variant] Switch to TOT Variantlib & NVIDIA-Variant-Plugin
[CI] Build variant wheels for CUDA 12 and 13
Update categorical docs to remove experimental label
[doc] Add R code blocks for the intercept introduction.
[ltr] Improve seed with mean sampling for the first iteration.
[CI] Build and test XGBoost with CUDA 13
Cleanup IO functions and add IO for GPU QDM.
[EM] Fix race in the iterator accessor policy.
Cleanup the softmax implementation and cub functions.
Small cleanup for the objective interface and intercept document.
Cleanup the all_of implementation using thrust reduce.
Fix missing cub checks and streams.
[CI] Disable spot pricing for GPU workers
[CI] Test updated JVM images and NCCL.
[doc][EM] Provide a starting point on data sharding.
[enc] Throw error when DMatrix is empty.
Support leaf prediction with QDM on CPU.
Updated Machine Learning Challenge Winning Solutions. Updates #6173
Fix CPU inplace predict performance regression.
Sycl. Reduce predictor memory consumption and improve L2 locality
Hide the recode function to reduce binary size.
Small cleanup for the model types.
[backport] Add support for building xgboost wheels on Win-ARM64 (#11572, #11597, #11559)
Small cleanup to the proxy dmatrix.
[backport] Avoid using mean intercept for rmsle. (#11588)
Avoid using mean intercept for rmsle.
[doc] Split up the support matrix from the intro.
Add support for building xgboost wheels on Win-ARM64
Optionally include git hash during build.
[EM] More rigorous check for potential cross socket access.
[backport] Fix NDCG metric with non-exp gain. (#11534)
[backport] Clear CUDA error before pointer check (#11386)
Sycl. Improve L1 cache locality for histogram building.
[enc] Add a cat accessor to the booster.
[EM] Small tests for the no-concat option.
Fix compilation of Xgboost on WoA
[EM] Remove text file input for external memory.
Remove the deprecated binary model for gblinear.
[EM] Check whether memory policy is set.
[enc] Add tests for re-coding validation datasets.
Remove cpp tests for deprecated binary model.
Support mixed metrics for the skl interface.
[doc][EM] Add a brief introduction to NUMA.
[jvm-packages] Fix JVM docs build, by making `LabeledPoint` a Java class
[pyspark] Validate the validation indicator column type.
Remove the use of `gpu_id` in cpp tests.
Avoid the use of `restrict` in the evaluator.
[doc] Small cleanup and updates for documentation.
Fix NDCG metric with non-exp gain.
Fix static linking C++ libraries on macOS
SYCL. Fallback to CPU in multiclass_obj for fp32 devices.
[EM] Initial support for using snappy with sparse data.
SYCL. Fix training continuation for fp32 devices.
Fixing a bug in the Spark fit-method when passing in None for certain parameters
Fix typos in CONTRIBUTORS.md: 'a open' -> 'an open' and 'Committers comes' -> 'Committers come'
[EM] By pass device copy if the page fits into device memory.
[backport] Fix VM fallback logic on WSL2 (#11471)
Fix VM fallback logic on WSL2
Check nvidia smi version before loading decomp API.
Reduce flakiness of the pyspark conf test.
[EM] Initial support for splitting up the host cache.
Add wrapper for CUDA host pinned memory pool.
[EM] Drop support for the device cache.
[backport] Replace nan with denormal floating point. (#11428)
[backport] Fix page concatenation for validation dataset. (#11338)
[backport] Allow fallback for CUDA virtual memory. (#11391, #11398)
Allow fallback for CUDA virtual memory.
Replace nan with denormal floating point.
[dask] Small cleanup for the predict function.
Use Sphinx Tabs to separate Python/R code in tutorial for advanced objectives
[doc] Update notes about GPU memory usage.
[jvm-packages] Update helper script for publishing Maven Central (#11393)
Share Python updater tests between CPU and GPU.
Make CUDA version check compatible with future versions.
rename param.hh/cc to hist_param.hh/cc to fix xcode build
[jvm-packages] Update helper script for publishing Maven Central
Use GPU AllreduceV for distributed quantile sketch exchange
Add Automatic Module Names for Java packages
